allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\MiKTeX\\miktex\\bin\\x64\\pdflatex.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\MiKTeX\\miktex\\bin\\x64\\pdflatex.exe", "C:\\texlive\\2024\\bin\\windows\\pdflatex.exe", "C:\\texlive\\2025\\bin\\windows\\pdflatex.exe", "C:\\texlive\\2026\\bin\\windows\\pdflatex.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; try { \(Get-Command pdflatex -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { Write-Output "pdflatex not in PATH" })
